statement: In every magma, Equation 521 (`x = y * (y * (z * (x * y)))`) implies Equation 1515 (`x = (y * y) * (x * (x * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0256
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op y (op z (op x y))))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y y) (op x (op x x)))
